NUM_COMMS_SAFE_DSPSL_MDCTNS 

LABEL: Number of communications sent to beneficiary regarding safe disposal of medications 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of communications sent to beneficiary regarding safe disposal of 
medications. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 0-xx or Null/missing
